_comment: Verified custom GoT task. Pass these fields to the MCP tool `execute_got_graph` (task_name='custom'), or to create_got_session + add_got_operation. Demonstrates working TEXT-BASED scoring (the LLM emits a number, DynamicParser extracts it, keep_best_n prunes on it) — the capability the built-in sorting/keyword/set_intersection tasks deliberately omit. Pattern: generate(x4) -> score -> keep_best_n(2) -> aggregate -> improve.

initial_parameters.original: Reduce hallucination in a production RAG (retrieval-augmented generation) system that answers questions over an internal company knowledge base

templates.score:
Rate the following strategy for reducing hallucination in a production RAG system on a 0-100 scale, where the score reflects (technical impact) x (implementation feasibility). Output ONLY an integer 0-100, nothing else.
Strategy: {state_dicts}
templates.aggregation: Combine the best strategies below into ONE unified, coherent engineering plan (a tight paragraph) that sequences them sensibly and notes any synergy. Strategies: {state_dicts}
templates.improve:
Improve this RAG anti-hallucination plan: make each step concrete (name techniques, metrics, and where it sits in the pipeline). Keep it to one focused paragraph. Output only the improved plan.
Current plan: {current}
